center.name: Aguán River
center.summary: Aguán River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Green-backed sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: twomeyi is found disjunctly in north-central Honduras in the Aguán River valley of Yoro Department and the valley of the Agalta and Catacamas rivers in Olancho Department. In most of its range the green-backed sparrow inhabits the edges of tropical semi-deciduous and evergreen forest, savanna, and secondary forest
